component.name: Blogs
component.script:
function init() m.profileImage = m.top.findNode("profileImage") m.nameLabel = m.top.findNode("nameLabel") m.roleLabel = m.top.findNode("roleLabel") m.descriptionLabel = m.top.findNode("descriptionLabel") end function
sub onImgUrlChange() m.profileImage.uri = m.imgUrl end sub
sub onNameChange() m.nameLabel.text = m.name end sub
sub onRoleChange() m.roleLabel.text = m.role end sub
sub onDescriptionChange() m.descriptionLabel.text = m.description end sub
function onKeyEvent(key as String, press as Boolean) as Boolean if press and key = "back" then m.top.close = true return true end if return false end function
